name: Hi-Protein Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the worms as in the previous recipe.
2. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Add the eggs to the mixture and beat well.
4. Sift together the white flour, whole wheat flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, and cloves.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with the applesauce, mixing gently after each addition.
6. Stir in the prepared earthworms, chopped nuts, and raisins until evenly distributed.
7. Pour the batter into a well-greased 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake at 325°F for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
